name: Golden Check Cashing
description_short: Golden Check Cashing in Los Angeles offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment, and lottery ticket sales at a location inside the Avalon swap meet.
description_long: Golden Check Cashing is a check-cashing service located at 13000 Avalon Boulevard in Los Angeles, California, within the Avalon swap meet facility. The business operates as a cash access and financial services point for the local community. According to customer reviews on Yelp, the location has maintained a 4.0-star rating based on 2 reviews, with both reviewers rating the service as 4 stars. Golden Check Cashing provides a range of check-cashing and financial transaction services typical of traditional check-cashing establishments. The company offers check cashing, money order purchases, wire money transfers, bill payment processing, fax services, and lottery ticket sales. This combination of services positions it as a one-stop financial services location for customers who may not have access to traditional banking services or who prefer cash-based transactions. The business operates as a walk-in location without appointment requirements. One distinguishing factor noted in customer reviews is the swap meet location, which places it within an established retail marketplace environment. Customer feedback indicates that the young cashier staff provides courteous service during transactions. However, like many high-traffic financial service locations, customer reviews note that wait times can be lengthy during peak hours, requiring customers to time their visits strategically. The business appears to serve a primarily cash-based customer demographic in the South Los Angeles area. Golden Check Cashing represents a traditional check-cashing model with a straightforward service offering and community location within a swap meet. While convenient for quick financial transactions, the business does not offer credit products, loans, or financial advisory services. The 4.0-star rating on limited reviews suggests baseline customer satisfaction, though the small review sample limits broader assessment.
pros: Located inside the Avalon swap meet, providing convenient access within an established retail marketplace
Offers multiple financial services in one location: check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment, and lottery tickets
Staff noted as courteous and professional in handling customer transactions
Walk-in service with no appointment required for quick access
4.0-star rating on customer reviews indicating baseline satisfaction
Serves underbanked populations in South Los Angeles with cash-based transaction options
Fax services available in addition to financial transactions
cons: Long wait times during peak hours requiring strategic timing of visits
Very limited customer review sample (only 2 reviews) reduces confidence in assessment
No information available about fee structure or pricing competitiveness
No indication of extended hours or weekend availability in provided information
Limited online presence beyond Yahoo Local listing suggests minimal digital services
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals in the South Los Angeles area needing immediate check cashing
Swap meet shoppers who need to cash checks or purchase money orders during retail visits
Customers preferring cash-based financial transactions without bank accounts
diagnosis: Golden Check Cashing is best for unbanked consumers in South Los Angeles who need immediate check cashing and basic financial services in a convenient swap meet location. The main caveat is limited information about fee structures and pricing—customers should confirm rates before use, as check-cashing fees vary significantly by provider.
